sessionName: Hypertrophy B — full circuit (5K TT moved to Sun)
intro: Athlete call (Adj #146): full Hyp B incl. seated calf today, 5K TT tomorrow AM. Calf 345: sets 1-3 keep RIR 1+, last set ONLY to failure — zero headroom (Adj #135) and the TT is <24 h out. AM Achilles read before lifting. Pushdown now works 25 — landed Tue with a clean elbow (Adj #151).

table.cue: Bump lands on a clean set 3 (RIR 1) holding the 8-rep floor (Adj #133)
Hold — rebuild needs sets 1-2 both RIR 1+ (Adj #134)
Bump per Adj #137; stay inside the 12-15 band

table.exercise: Preacher curl machine, unilateral (semi-supinated if available)
table.cue: Hold 60 — 65 needs a full clean outing (Adj #139)
Landed Tue at 4×12 (12/12/9/8, elbow clean) — hold-until-clean: set 3 RIR 1+ at 12; any elbow symptom → drop to 22.5 (Adj #151)

table.rir: sets 1-3 ≥1; last set only to failure
table.cue: Zero-headroom hold — TT tomorrow; do NOT run all sets to failure (Adj #135/#146)
First to cut if the session runs past 40 min (§6); Adj #140 re-evaluate

lift.warmup: General: 1–2 min band pull-aparts + scap push-ups. Wrist-extensor isometric 3×30 s/arm (§10.A pre-lift).
lift.cooldown: Tyler twists 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15 (4 s eccentric); daily SI prehab. Early night — 5K TT tomorrow AM.

currentLoads.lastVerified: W12 Tue 7/7 (§5 re-test: 145×5 RIR 2 top + AMRAP 130×13 RIR 0)
currentLoads.note: §5 re-test executed — e1RM ~186 → TM 162→168. Three-week 145 hold converts: bump 150 at W13 Tue, Build scheme opens (1×5 @ working + AMRAP @ 80% TM = 135); if 150×5 lands ≤RIR 1 → back to 145 (Adj #148)
160 BUMP LANDED — set 3 clean RIR 1 at 8 reps met the Adj #115 gate; bump 165 today on a clean set 3 (Adj #133)
Regression — all three sets to failure on a fresh + fed day. Hold 75; ladder needs sets 1-2 both RIR 1+ (Adj #134)

In-band spread repeated = Adj #117 condition met; bump 35 today, 5-lb jumps (Adj #137)
Cleanest 65 outing — openers RIR 3/3, set 3 clean RIR 1, set 4 pushed 11. Double progression met → bump 70 next Tue; Sat slot unaffected (Adj #150)
Opener finally clean but back half fell to failure. Hold 60 today; 65 re-attempt needs a full clean outing (Adj #139)
25 re-attempt fired, elbow fully clean — sets 1-2 held the 12 floor, back half fell to failure (same shape as the 22.5 debut). Hold 25 both slots; hold-until-clean = set 3 RIR 1+ at 12 (Adj #151)
135 landed — set 1 RIR 3 = the prescribed RPE 7 target. Hold (Adj #153)
Hold 345 — no 355 until sets 1-3 show RIR 1+. Today: last set ONLY to failure, TT is <24 h out (Adj #135/#146)

currentLoads.load: Tue slot: BW+10 lb (hold, rebuild to 3×12); Sat slot: BW → add ~10 lb today
currentLoads.note: Tue +10 debut proved the load (set 1 = 12 @ RIR 2) but bled to 8/8 to failure — hold +10, rebuild. Sat debuts +10 at 3×10 today; expect a similar back-half cost (Adj #152/#138)
